title: CLI Package Split Execution Root
description: Shared execution root for the CLI package split. Coordinates small extraction beads, consolidated CLI test migration, final validation, documentation follow-up, and review signoff for the refactor.
acceptance_criteria: All implementation, testing, documentation, and review work for the CLI split is represented under this feature container.
Execution order preserves the dependency on scheduler refactor outputs from spec-2e7c81af, especially shared test helpers needed for CLI test migration.
The resulting plan preserves public API compatibility, avoids circular imports, and stages validation after the full related implementation set is complete.
